_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Post-Nephrolithotomy follow-up to confirm stone removal

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management, advise for the procedure
Discharge Summary of last admission for Nephrolithotomy procedure

ppd_preauth.q: Was the Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management, advise for the procedure submitted?
Was the Discharge Summary of last admission for Nephrolithotomy procedure submitted?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed indoor case papers with daily vitals and treatment details available?
Was the Detailed Procedure/Operative/follow-up (For follow up visit) notes submitted?
Was the Detailed discharge summary submitted?

common_queries: Clinical notes including evaluation findings, indication for procedure, and planned line of management, advise for the procedure missing or incomplete at pre-authorization stage for follow-up
Discharge Summary of last admission for Nephrolithotomy procedure missing or incomplete at pre-authorization stage
Detailed Indoor case papers missing or incomplete at claim submission stage for follow-up
Detailed Procedure / operation notes missing or incomplete at claim submission stage for follow-up visit
Urine routine report missing or incomplete at claim submission stage
Detailed discharge summary missing or incomplete at claim submission stage for follow-up

clinical_key_pointers: Follow-up Visit: an imaging study to confirm the removal of all stone particle, prescribing drugs and Patient education.
